comment: Example first-attestation payloads for the 700M NST/Troptions pledge. Use after computing exact hashes from the canonical OneDrive PDFs via the backend hasher. Apostle first, then mirrors.

reserveAttestation.note: Scotia Bank Canada custody per Schedule A; first-priority security interest per Master Asset Pledge Security Agreement; Troptions authorized to file UCC-1
